name: Prime Padel Pattaya
addressFull: 16/111 Sukhumvit 41, Pattaya City, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Daily 08:00-23:00 according to Playtomic, BestPadel and the current Google Maps listing.

courts.configuration: Four indoor doubles panoramic courts: one blue court, two black courts including the centre court, and one further blue court.

booking.hourlyRate: ฿800-1,000 per hour on the current RacketThailand listing
booking.leadTime: No minimum lead time is published; Playtomic shows live availability.
booking.notes: RacketThailand does not identify which time bands produce the published range. A Playtomic grand-opening offer that began 28 March advertised earlier higher regular rates, so the exact current operator tariff should be reconfirmed.

openPlay.levelGrading: Playtomic uses its 0-7 scale and names beginner and intermediate sessions.
openPlay.sessionCost: ฿400 open play; ฿500 Mexicano leveling; ฿600 Americano
openPlay.notes: The current calendar lists beginner and intermediate Americanos plus an unrestricted open-play session. Direct one-to-one partner matching outside organised sessions was not established.

coaching.groupRate: From ฿700 for a 60-minute public beginner class
coaching.beginnerCourse: Beginner public classes are listed on Playtomic

englishEvidence: A first-hand English player account dated 7 May 2026 describes an actual coaching session with Spanish coach Joan and head coach Alex. Playtomic's full English booking flow and the club's hosting of international APPT competition provide additional direct visitor pathways.
facilities: pro shop and racket test centre

audience.whoShouldSkip: Players who specifically require air-conditioned courts should confirm before booking: the evidence establishes a high, fully covered and well-ventilated hall, but not court air conditioning.

praise: Recent Thai reviewers repeatedly describe a high roof and strong airflow that keep the covered courts comfortable despite direct sun.
Thai reviews also praise the clean new facility, air-conditioned bathrooms, child waiting/play space, parking and easy motorway access.
Beginners mention staff or coaches actively teaching them, while both Thai and English reviews describe friendly service.
complaints: No repeated complaint emerged from the visible recent Thai review set. The current rating distribution contains one four-star review and no one-to-three-star reviews, so this is a negative finding rather than proof that the venue has no drawbacks.

comparison.differentiator: Four fully covered panoramic courts with a live Playtomic social calendar and demonstrated capacity to host national and international tournaments.

sources.label: Google Maps identity, coordinates, status and Thai reviews
Playtomic courts, booking, social play, coaching prices and amenities

unverified: which time bands produce the published court-price range
